name: Death Park 2
short_description: Shoot terrifying monsters and a killer clown in a haunted city full of nightmares. Explore 8 locations, solve puzzles, switch between dream and reality, and make choices that shape your escape. Death Park 2 is a horror FPS with multiple endings and a boss fight.
detailed_description:
🎭 Death Park 2 – Survive the horror, save your sister, and uncover the origin of the clown.

In this terrifying sequel, you’ll explore a nightmare-ridden city filled with monsters, traps, and twisted secrets. A killer clown is back… and this time, the fate of your sister and Farland itself depends on you.

Move between the real world and the world of sleep to solve puzzles, fight terrifying creatures, and face your worst fears. Every decision you make shapes the story, and only a few players will see the true ending.

🤡 Scary clown and terrifying monsters

🧠 Unique puzzles with two difficulty modes

🏙️ 8 massive locations: city streets, hospital, sewers, cemetery, military base & more

🔄 Two worlds to explore – reality and nightmares

🎮 Multiple endings – your decisions matter

🎧 Original soundtrack and creepy sound design

🕹️ First-person shooter with action & stealth

🩸 Can you handle what lurks in the shadows? Or will the clown claim the lives of your family?

supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Arabic, Simplified Chinese, Korean, Norwegian, Polish, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian*, Thai, Turkish, Ukrainian, Finnish, Swedish, Japanese, Malay, Hindi
*languages with full audio support
